subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 776705265/250812644 is not a GRB
body:
O. Mukherjee (USRA) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 776705265/250812644 at 15:27:40.88 UT
on 12 August 2025, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
